use_cases: Landing pages for SaaS products with lead capture focus
Product launch pages with animated visual impact
Marketing sites requiring modern dark-themed hero sections
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero component featuring animated gradient blobs with blur effects, noise texture overlay, and responsive navigation with mobile menu support. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and includes call-to-action buttons. The component uses a multi-layered background with purple, pink, and yellow gradients to create visual depth and modern appeal.
